name: Buffalo Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt together the butter and shortening.
2. Cream with brown sugar, granulated sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and baking powder. Add to the creamed mixture in three additions, mixing gently after each addition.
4. Mix in the oats, cereal, chocolate chips, coconut flakes, and pecans until evenly distributed.
5. Drop large spoonfuls of dough onto a lined cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes or until set.
